goal: Build a 30-minute loop-safe scripted demo wrapper that resets per cycle, catches exceptions, throttles to real-time, and tolerates slow memory leaks via periodic process restart.
thoughts: Scripted demo, not RL. Core reliability pattern: (1) per-cycle reset to a known snapshot (saved once at scene-author time), (2) try/except around each cycle with auto-restart (never let the exception surface), (3) kit update-event-stream stepping so motion syncs to the renderer clock (while True: time.sleep(0.1) desyncs). Memory growth from Replicator/texture cache over 30 min is real — schedule a belt-and-braces process restart every N cycles. Disable laptop sleep or the demo dies at minute 15.
code:
# 1. Save a clean delta snapshot of the scene at authoring time
save_delta_snapshot(name="demo_t0", scope="/World")

# 2. Patterns for kit's update event stream (sync to renderer clock)
lookup_knowledge(query="omni.kit.app update event stream time-synced stepping scripted demo loop")

# 3. Cycle skeleton (sketched; authored in demo_loop.py)

#     for wp in WAYPOINTS:
#         set_joint_targets('<ROBOT_PRIM_PATH>', targets=wp, blocking=True, timeout=<WP_TIMEOUT>)
#         wait_for_step()      # sync to update-event-stream, NOT time.sleep
#
# def main():
#     i = 0
#     while True:
#         try:

#             run_cycle()
#             set_attribute('/World/Lights/Status', 'inputs:color', (0,1,0))
#         except Exception as e:

#             continue
#         i += 1
#         if i % <RESTART_EVERY> == 0:                    # belt-and-braces
#             exit(42)                                     # systemd respawn

# 4. Dry-run 5 min and check for leaks / drift
check_physics_health()

# 5. On the demo laptop:
#    - systemd-inhibit --why='demo' ... OR caffeinate
#    - disable screen blanking + sleep + network power management
#    - systemd unit with Restart=always so exit(42) respawns instantly
failure_modes: while True: time.sleep(0.1) — drifts from renderer, motion goes jittery
No per-cycle reset — boxes end up scattered after 10 cycles, demo looks broken
Unhandled exception on one cycle kills the whole 30-min loop
Laptop sleeps at minute 15 — no caffeine/inhibit, customer sees a lock screen
